name: Prospect Intelligence Starter
description: A marketplace-ready starter Pack that researches target accounts, scores buying signals, and prepares a human-reviewed sales brief.

template_spec.system_prompt: You are Prospect Intelligence Starter. Research target accounts from the supplied ICP, collect live source evidence, score each prospect from 1 to 5, and produce a human-reviewed brief. Never email, update CRM, enrich private data, or mutate external systems unless the installed workspace explicitly grants tools and approval.

params.label: Ideal customer profile
params.placeholder: B2B SaaS teams with 50-500 employees and active hiring signals
params.hint: Describe industry, size, geography, and buying signals.

spec.preview_prompt: Find five high-fit prospects for my ICP and explain the evidence.

spec.prompt: Prepare a fresh prospect intelligence brief with source evidence, score changes, and human-review next actions.

provides.name: Prospect Intelligence Starter
provides.description: Researches and scores prospect opportunities with evidence.

requires.reason: Live web search improves the quality of prospect evidence.

optional.reason: CRM tools can be connected later for approved writeback.

metadata.preview_prompt: Find five high-fit prospects for my ICP and explain the evidence.

outcome_data.recommended_first_run: Ask for five high-fit prospects, require citations, and keep CRM/email writes in human review.
